specSource: Lead AI Research Engineer — Heuristic Anchoring spec

pdfjs-dist.role: PDF text extraction in browser (replaces pdf-parse which is Node.js only)

date-fns.role: Date utilities (available but TemporalMapper uses native Date for zero-dependency)

levenshtein-edit-distance.role: Name matching in IdentityMatcher — replaces custom O(m×n) implementation as of v1.1

pdf-parse.reason: Node.js only (requires fs/Buffer/crypto) — incompatible with browser bundle. pdfjs-dist covers all PDF needs.

extractionPipeline: 1. analyzePdfMetadata() — read first 10 KB as Latin-1, extract /Producer /Creator
2. extractPdfText()    — pdfjs-dist, pages 1→min(N,5), concat, max 8000 chars
3. extractImageText()  — tesseract.js v7, lang=fra, if PDF text empty
4. detectQr()          — jsqr on canvas render of page 1 at 2.5x scale
5. classifyDocument()  — score against 8 DocProfile × N AnchorGroups
6. extractFields()     — regex SIRET/Net/Brut/RFR/IBAN from classified text
7. buildFraudSignals() — Luhn, ratio, QR presence, metadata flags
DocumentIntelligence.scoringFormula: score = Σ(groups) max(baseWeight * proxFactor) + Σ(secondary matched) * 5 — penalty(fraudSignals)
DocumentIntelligence.proximityFactor: 1.0 if all primary anchors within proximityChars, else 0.6
DocumentIntelligence.certaintyShortCircuit: confidence = 100 immediately if ANY certaintyToken found in text

pdfMetadata.method: Latin-1 decode of first 10240 bytes, regex /Producer and /Creator

confidenceLevels.40-69: needsConfirmation=true — modal with family picker shown to user

TemporalMapper.alreadyAssignedHandling: Set<string> passed per dossier session — prevents slot collision

IdentityMatcher.changedInV1_1: Custom O(m×n) Levenshtein replaced by levenshtein-edit-distance npm package

TD1.note: Recto-verso fusion: pdfjs-dist reads both pages into single text corpus before MRZ scan

matchLevels.no_name: user profile has no firstName AND no lastName

IdentityMatcher.fuzzyText: sliding word window + consecutive bigrams for compound names

cardFeatures: identityLabel badge (emerald if MRZ, blue if text-only)
Risk badges: Suspect / À vérifier / OK / QR / OCR / Erreur
Expandable LiveTerminal — scanLogs colored by prefix [OK]/[WARN]/[ERR]/[INFO]
KanbanBoard.columnHighlight: isOver → border-dashed colored + background shift via useDroppable
KanbanBoard.ghostCard: DragOverlay with CardContent isDragging=true — scale-105 shadow-2xl
KanbanBoard.onMoveEntry: visual reclassification + toast + appended '[INFO] Reclassé' log

magicPhases.drop: MagicDropZone — multi-file drag area with animated instruction text
magicPhases.scanning: FileScanCard grid — progress bars, live logs per file during scan
magicPhases.kanban: KanbanBoard — 9-column drag & drop, cross-doc warnings, header nav
magicPhases.dashboard: Legacy wizard dashboard (accessible via header button)

DossierLocatif.userIdentity: const { user } = useAuth() — user.firstName / user.lastName for MRZ matching

prefixes.[OK]: green — extraction réussie, SIRET Luhn ✓, MRZ trouvé, upload
prefixes.[WARN]: amber — non reconnu, période introuvable, métadata suspecte, nom ≠ profil

timeline: [WARN] Nom introuvable ou profil sans identité

notInstalled.pdf-parse: Node.js library — requires fs/Buffer/Node crypto. Cannot run in browser. Use pdfjs-dist instead.
notInstalled.note: All browser-compatible equivalents for the spec are installed.

commits.desc: DocumentIntelligence proximity-anchored scoring + PDF forensics + certainty tokens
TemporalMapper M-x + IdentityMatcher MRZ+Levenshtein + Kanban + live logs

pendingWork.desc: Persist Kanban drag & drop reclassification to DB
pendingWork.note: dossierService.updateDocument does not exist — visual only for now

pendingWork.desc: Explicit recto-verso merge logic for 2-page CNI PDFs
pendingWork.note: Currently implicit: pdfjs-dist concatenates pages 1–5 before MRZ scan. Explicit page-labeling (page1=recto, page2=verso) not implemented.
